message:
test(table-theme): add 29 unit tests for table theme system

Cover gradient sampling (empty, single, two-stop, sorting, clamping),
lerp_u8 interpolation, StyleMask constructors (all, none, fg_bg),
TableEffectRule builder chain, TableTheme builders (padding, gap,
height, effects, preset_id, clear_effects), diagnostics capture,
TableEffectScope constructors, animation curves (pulse, breathing,
skew_phase), and blend modes (additive, multiply) via resolver.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
